name: FAI_SAM_TBS_OCTO_METRIC_V
query: select "METRIC_ID","KEY","VALUE","TYPE","DESCRIPTION","CREATED_BY","CREATION_DATE","LAST_UPDATED_BY","LAST_UPDATE_DATE","LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN","ENTERPRISE_ID","OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER" from FAI_SAM_METRIC where last_update_date >= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - interval '1' day
